title: x07.wasm.runtime.limits@0.1.0
description: Host-enforced runtime limits for executing x07-produced WebAssembly (fuel, memory, table, stack).

max_fuel.description: Maximum Wasmtime fuel for a single run. null disables fuel metering.

max_memory_bytes.description: Maximum linear memory bytes for a single instance. null means host default.

max_table_elements.description: Maximum table elements for a single instance. null means host default.

max_wasm_stack_bytes.description: Maximum wasm stack bytes. null means host default.
